calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-18-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-18-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
J. Michael Phelps, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Arturo Ramirez; Mirella Ramirez and Diana Marie Ramirez.
No appearance by the Defendants: Elena Garcia; Ruben Garcia; Arnulfo Garcia and Luz Maria Garcia.
Plaintiff's witness: Arturo Ramirez, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 2675 21st Street, San Francisco.
Rental agreement is Foefeited.
Rent and Per Diem Damages of 4,409.00
Attorney's Fees $8,885.00
Costs $405.00
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-10-2005 Continued To Jan-18-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
